name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Helix
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is missing or frustrating?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Alternative solutions

What other approaches have you considered?

## Scope

Does this apply to streaming, local files, UI, packaging, or another area?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, mockups, or references here if helpful.
